summary: Chantier 7 — Registre des risques. All 24 test points validated. 18/18 backend tests pass, all UI flows working correctly. No issues found.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Risque chantier 7 (deleted), TEST_Risque PMO creation (remains in SAP project with criticality=4). SAP project now shows 7 risks total (6 seed + 1 PMO test risk).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 7 fully validated. SAP project has 7 risks. Heatmap working with P4×I5=2 risks tooltip, criticality badges red/orange/green. READ_ONLY cannot see +Nouveau risque or trash buttons. PMO can create/update but not delete (403). TENANT_ADMIN can delete (204). Dashboard top-risks widget shows 10 risks sorted desc with project links. Chantier 6 Budget CAPEX/OPEX section still present (regression OK). Test PMO risk 'TEST_Risque PMO creation' (criticality=4) remains in SAP project.
